answers.sql: SELECT context, bulk_retail, passings, pct FROM "curated_core".v_passings_bulk_retail_split ORDER BY context, bulk_retail;
answers.notes: Business = 567 bulk / 1,234 retail (31.5% / 68.5%); pipeline rows = 153,322 bulk passings (100% bulk). View refreshed for the 2026-01-23 partition.

answers.sql: SELECT format_datetime(date_trunc('month', date_parse(entry_date,'%m/%d/%Y')), 'yyyy-MM') AS posting_month, SUM(CAST(amount AS double)) AS amt FROM "gwi_raw_intacct".gl_entries WHERE entry_date IS NOT NULL AND entry_date != '' GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1 DESC LIMIT 6;
answers.notes: Latest months: 2024-04 $9,154.93; 2024-03 $2,100.76; 2024-02 $28,982.05; 2024-01 $539,842.99. Even after the 2026-01-24 ingestion the newest posting month remains 2024-04 because GLENTRY rows still top out there, so 2024-05+ P&L requires fresher partitions or other joins.

answers.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS gl_count, MAX(date_parse(entry_date,'%m/%d/%Y')) AS latest_posting FROM "gwi_raw_intacct".gl_entries;
answers.notes: GLENTRY currently has 3,000 rows with the freshest posting on 2024-04-17; the 2026-01-24 ingestion also shows 2024-04-17 as the max posting, so a newer ledger partition or subscriber-level join is still required for 2024-05+ finances.
